topic.what: A binary format (ELLF) that augments ELF with metadata to make disassembly and lifting decidable by encoding compiler intent at build time
topic.how: Embeds 5 oracles (instruction, pointer, text, stack, data) capturing which bytes are instructions, which values are pointers, function boundaries, and memory structure
topic.why_matters: Enables reliable disassembly, lifting, instrumentation, and recompilation of stripped binaries without source code, solving inherently undecidable problems by encoding information known at compile time

characteristics.what_it_measures: Size of ELLF metadata relative to DWARF debugging info
characteristics.evidence: Section 1 abstract states metadata is roughly 17% of DWARF size
characteristics.context: Final ELLF binary contains metadata that is 17% of DWARF size

characteristics.what_it_measures: Correctness of lifted assembly when disassembled and recompiled
characteristics.evidence: Section 4 evaluation recompiled LLVM Test Suite binaries and verified behavior matches originals
characteristics.context: Validation performed across comprehensive set of real-world C and C++ binaries

characteristics.what_it_measures: Runtime performance overhead of binaries with ELLF metadata
characteristics.evidence: Section 1 abstract states adding metadata does not affect runtime behavior or performance
characteristics.context: Metadata is read-only at runtime and does not affect execution

characteristics.what_it_measures: Additional time to generate metadata during compilation
characteristics.evidence: Section 3 discusses compiler modifications but states no significant overhead in Section 1
characteristics.context: Requires additional compiler flags but no major slowdown reported

characteristics.what_it_measures: Breadth of test cases validated for correctness
characteristics.evidence: Section 4 evaluation used LLVM Test Suite for comprehensive validation
characteristics.context: Real-world C and C++ binaries compiled and validated

novelty: First format to make disassembly decidable via build-time metadata
Encode compiler intent as 5 oracle types for lifting pipeline
Demonstrate recompilable lifting from metadata-augmented binaries
Evaluate correctness across LLVM Test Suite with behavior verification
open_problems: Extension to non-x86 architectures and non-ELF formats
Handling of highly optimized or obfuscated binaries
Graceful handling of stripped binaries without metadata
